_schema.description: All Avana training programs — past and upcoming combined. The site computes 'past' vs 'upcoming' at render time by comparing program.date to today (no status flag to flip). To add a program: append to programs[]; drop photos into images/training/{slug}/ named 01.jpg, 02.jpg, …; set photoCount; commit. The catalogue editor (_tools/catalog-editor.html → Training tab) handles all of this without hand-editing JSON.

fields.slug: kebab-case identifier; ALSO the photo folder name under images/training/
fields.name: Public-facing program title
fields.date: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD. If date <  today → renders as Past. If date >= today → renders as Upcoming.
fields.endDate: Optional ISO date for multi-day programs
fields.doctors: Array of strings — faculty / faculty teams
fields.activities: Array of activity slugs from controlledVocab.activities below
fields.highlights: Optional array of 2–4 bullet points (best for past programs)
fields.photoCount: Number of photos in images/training/{slug}/ named 01.jpg … NN.jpg. Page renders all with onerror=hide so any missing numbers vanish.
fields.photoFolder: Auto-set to images/training/{slug}/ — kept here so loader doesn't have to compose it
fields.registrationUrl: Optional — for upcoming programs only. If omitted, the page falls back to a mailto: link.

programs.name: Sample · Advanced Knee Reconstruction Cadaver Workshop
programs.description: This is a placeholder sample so the Surgeon page renders Past + Upcoming sections immediately. Delete this entry once real programs are added via the admin.
